items.title: feat: nature downloader 出版商授权路径稳定性升级 (#119)
items.description:
feat: nature downloader 出版商授权路径稳定性升级 (#119)

Fixes CNKI-only routing for Chinese titles with non-CNKI PDF URLs and preserves complete explicit DOI lists unless --count is provided.\n\nVerified: Node 105/105, Python 10/10, MJS syntax checks, and git diff --check.
items.label: commit
